title: Professional High-End Studio Portrait Sharp Looking
sourceTitle: Professional High End Studio Portrait Sharp Looking
prompt: ​A professional, high-end studio portrait of a sharp-looking man resembling Cristiano Ronaldo. He is wearing a sophisticated, dark charcoal textured blazer over a simple, well-fitted black crew-neck t-shirt. On his wrist, he sports a luxury watch with a leather strap. His hair is neatly styled in a clean, short fade with a slight comb-over. He is captured in a three-quarter view, looking slightly off-camera to the side with a serious, confident expression. The setting is a dimly lit photography studio background with a dark gray backdrop, visible studio lighting equipment, softboxes, and subtle warm bokeh highlights in the background. The lighting is cinematic, utilizing a strong rim light that highlights his profile and contours, creating a dramatic, premium, and moody atmosphere.
